info.name: BuySawa API v1
info.description:
# BuySawa Client API (v1)

Professional Postman collection for **front-end**, **mobile**, and **QA** teams.

## Base URL
All requests target `{{base_url}}/api/v1`.

## Required headers (auto-applied)
| Header | Variable | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `X-Market` | `{{market_code}}` | Market code (`ae`, etc.). Required on every request except payment webhooks. |
| `Accept` | `application/json` | Always JSON. |
| `Accept-Language` | `{{accept_language}}` | `en` or `ar` — controls translated messages and localized content. |

## Authentication
Protected routes use **Bearer token** (Laravel Sanctum). Run **Auth → Login** or **Auth → Verify OTP** — the token is saved automatically to `{{auth_token}}`.

## Response envelope
```json
{
  "code": 200,
  "message": "Human-readable message (localized)",
  "data": {},
  "pagination": { "current_page": 1, "last_page": 1, "per_page": 15, "total": 0 }
}
```
`pagination` is present only on paginated list endpoints.

## Seeded test credentials (local)
After `php artisan migrate:fresh --seed`:
- **Phone:** `+971501234567`
- **Password:** `password`
- **Market:** `ae`
- **Coupon:** `SAVE10`

## Languages (EN / AR)
Every major endpoint includes **saved examples** in both languages:
- **English** — `Accept-Language: en` (messages + localized content in English)
- **Arabic (العربية)** — `Accept-Language: ar` (messages + localized content in Arabic)

Switch language by changing **`accept_language`** in your active environment (`en` or `ar`). Each request sends `Accept-Language: {{accept_language}}` — do not add a second Accept-Language header manually.

Use **BuySawa — Local (AR)** environment for Arabic, or set `accept_language` to `ar` in any environment.

Examples are captured live from your running server when available (`php artisan serve`), otherwise static fallbacks are used.

## Quick start
1. Import this collection + **BuySawa Local** environment.
2. Set `base_url` (default `http://localhost`).
3. Run **Setup → Get Current Market** to verify connectivity.
4. Run **Auth → Login** — token is stored automatically.
5. Explore protected folders (Cart, Orders, Wallet, etc.).

## Payment webhooks
Server-to-server only. Not used by mobile clients. Included for backend/QA integration testing.

variable.description: Default en — override in environment (use Local AR for ar)

item.name: 01 — Setup & Health
item.description: Verify market context and store configuration before testing.

header.description: Market code — set via environment (e.g. ae)
Language: en or ar — change accept_language in your active environment

request.description: Returns the resolved market based on `X-Market` header. Use this as a health check.

response.name: 200 OK — English
200 OK — Arabic (العربية)

header.description: Market code — set via environment (e.g. ae)
Language: en or ar — change accept_language in your active environment

request.description: Returns the active store profile (name, logo, contact info).

response.name: 200 OK — English
response.body:
{
    "code": 200,
    "message": "Store retrieved successfully",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "slug": "buysawa",
        "name": "BuySawa",
        "bio": "Your trusted online store for quality products.",
        "logo": null,
        "address": {
            "en": "Dubai, United Arab Emirates",
            "ar": "دبي، الإمارات العربية المتحدة"
        },
        "phone": "+971500000000",
        "email": "info@buysawa.com",
        "facebook": "https://facebook.com/buysawa",
        "instagram": "https://instagram.com/buysawa",
        "tiktok": null,
        "whatsapp": "+971500000000"
    }
}

item.name: 02 — Authentication
item.description: Registration, OTP verification, login, profile, and logout.

header.description: Market code — set via environment (e.g. ae)
Language: en or ar — change accept_language in your active environment

request.description:
Creates a new client account and sends OTP to phone.

**Note:** Use a unique phone number. Password requires confirmation.

header.description: Market code — set via environment (e.g. ae)
Language: en or ar — change accept_language in your active environment

request.description: Multipart registration with optional profile image (jpeg/png, max 2MB).

header.description: Market code — set via environment (e.g. ae)
Language: en or ar — change accept_language in your active environment

request.description:
Verifies registration OTP and returns auth token.

Replace `token` with the OTP received (check logs in local dev).

item.name: 04 — Products
item.description: Product listing, detail, comparison, and category facets.

header.description: Market code — set via environment (e.g. ae)
Language: en or ar — change accept_language in your active environment

request.description:
Paginated product catalog with filters.

**Attribute filters:** pass as `attributes[slug]=value` (e.g. `attributes[ram]=8gb`).

header.description: Market code — set via environment (e.g. ae)

request.description:
Places order from current cart.

**Payment methods:** `cash_on_delivery`, `online`, `wallet` (market-dependent).

**Group buy:** pass `group_buy_code` when joining an active group buy checkout.

body.raw:
{
    "phone": "{{user_phone}}",
    "country_id": {{country_id}},
    "governorate_id": {{governorate_id}},
    "city_id": {{city_id}},
    "address": "123 Sheikh Zayed Road, Downtown Dubai",
    "notes": "Please call before delivery",
    "payment_method": "cash_on_delivery",
    "coupon_code": "",
    "group_buy_code": ""
}
